description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:9.9.0 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single pages job that runs in the default stage, executes the commands: yarn, then PUBLIC_URL='/bytebeat-sequencer' yarn build, then mv public _public, then mv build public. The job publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact and is limited to the master branch. No additional services, variables, or stages are defined.
